extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims their laptop screen has a crack.

image_assessments.notes: A laptop is shown with its screen displaying a setup wizard, no damage is visible.
A laptop is shown with its screen severely shattered.

result.user_claim: Customer: Mi laptop se cayo de la mesa. | Support: What damage are you reporting? | Customer: La pantalla esta cracked, the screen has a crack. | Support: Is keyboard or hinge also part of this? | Customer: No, only laptop screen crack.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed screen with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed screen with visible crack. Supporting images: img_2.
